sigma.title: HTTP Request With Empty User Agent

osquery.name: t1497_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1497_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1497_sys_info
osquery.query_text: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

sigma_matches.title: HTTP Request With Empty User Agent

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 9 inherited-from-parent run(s) [no direct sub-technique executions], 1/1 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
